title: Smoky Spanish Salad
description: A refreshing salad with smoky notes from crispy Spanish tortilla, paired with sweet passionfruit and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Chop the passionfruit and set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together the salad greens, crumbled bacon, sliced red onion, and halved cherry tomatoes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the olive oil and vinegar.
Add the chopped passionfruit to the bowl and toss gently to combine.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to coat.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Crumble the Spanish tortilla into small pieces and sprinkle over the salad.
Garnish with additional passionfruit slices, if desired.
